extra.message: os.getenv() with a hardcoded default credential string. The fallback makes it trivial to access the service with a well-known password. Remove the default and require the environment variable to be explicitly set.

Hardcoded string literal passed as password= keyword argument. Load the credential from an environment variable instead: psycopg2.connect(..., password=os.getenv("DB_PASSWORD"))

Avoid float() for monetary values in financial calculations. Floating-point arithmetic can cause precision loss (e.g., 0.1 + 0.2 != 0.3). Use Decimal for prices/quantities, or integer cents for exchange values.
